title: Stripped Signs
description: Signs use stripped log/stem textures instead of planks
body:
This Resource Pack makes Signs more readable by making them use their respective Stripped Log/Stem texture instead of the default Planks texture. 

![Signs Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/059da49107ec386053ca102d8dbde86bc0b72b4d_0.webp)

The Bamboo Sign is unchanged since it has a unique texture already and is more readable with that than the Block of Stripped Bamboo texture.
